vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không bao giờ thỏa mãn
vocab.example: Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I used to spend hours dismantling old toys just to see how they worked.
I spent a vast amount of my childhood tinkering with broken gadgets in my father's workshop.
Building elaborate pillow forts was a quintessential part of my weekend routine as a young boy.
I would become completely engrossed in sketching comic strips whenever I had some spare time.

vocab.meaning: sự nỗ lực/vận động thể chất
vocab.example: I loved games that required intense physical exertion, such as playing tag or racing bikes with friends.

vocab.meaning: thích thú, tận hưởng tận cùng
vocab.example: Children often revel in the freedom of playing outdoors without any adult supervision.
My family lived near a forest, so I frequently went there to commune with nature and collect rare insects.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi nhập vai đầy tưởng tượng
vocab.example: We used to engage in imaginative role-play, pretending to be explorers discovering uncharted territories.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi đơn độc/một mình
vocab.example: Though I was social, I also enjoyed solitary pursuits like stamp collecting or solving jigsaw puzzles.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: Talking about my old board games always evokes a strong sense of nostalgia for simpler times.
